title: vernonia newbouldii
intro: Vernonia newbouldii, also known as the Newbould's ironweed, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as provide relief from pain and inflammation. Vernonia newbouldii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used in herbal infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits.
